seoTitle: Burrangong vs Burrawang — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Burrangong and Burrawang. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burrangong and Burrawang.
heading: Burrangong vs Burrawang — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burrangong, New South Wales and Burrawang, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burrangong has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Burrawang (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burrangong or Burrawang safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burrangong has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Burrawang scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burrangong scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Burrawang scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burrangong or Burrawang?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burrangong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
